eval_cases.trigger: Write a Playwright test for a login form with email and password fields
eval_cases.expected_behavior: Agent uses getByLabel() for form fields and getByRole() for submit button
eval_cases.anti_pattern_check: Does NOT use CSS selectors, XPath, or page.locator('.class')
assertions: Uses getByLabel or getByRole for password
Includes assertions on success state (URL change or element visibility)

eval_cases.trigger: Debug this flaky test that fails intermittently on CI
eval_cases.expected_behavior: Agent identifies race conditions, missing awaits, bad locators
eval_cases.anti_pattern_check: Does NOT suggest page.waitForTimeout(5000) as a fix
assertions: Recommends disabling retries to detect flakes

eval_cases.trigger: Set up Playwright in CI with GitHub Actions
eval_cases.expected_behavior: Agent creates complete workflow with sharding, browser install, artifact upload

eval_cases.trigger: Write a test for a mobile responsive hamburger menu
eval_cases.expected_behavior: Agent sets viewport to mobile size and uses getByRole

eval_cases.trigger: Write a visual regression test for the pricing page
eval_cases.expected_behavior: Agent uses element-level toHaveScreenshot with appropriate masking

eval_cases.trigger: Implement Page Object Model for a dashboard page
eval_cases.expected_behavior: Agent creates structured page objects with semantic locators
assertions: Methods return Locator objects or Promises
Follows single responsibility per page object

eval_cases.trigger: Write a test that handles OAuth/2FA authentication
Test that an XSS payload is properly sanitized
eval_cases.expected_behavior: Agent writes security test with XSS payload and content verification
assertions: Verifies payload is rendered as text, not HTML
Does not use page.evaluate to test XSS

near_miss_negatives.trigger: Write a Selenium test for a login form
near_miss_negatives.expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this is a Selenium request, not Playwright
near_miss_negatives.activation_check: Skill description mentions Playwright only; Selenium request should not trigger this skill

near_miss_negatives.expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — Cypress is a competing framework
near_miss_negatives.activation_check: Request specifies Cypress; skill should not trigger on Cypress-specific requests

near_miss_negatives.trigger: Write a unit test for a pure JavaScript function
near_miss_negatives.expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — unit testing is not in scope
near_miss_negatives.activation_check: Pure logic testing without browser interaction should not trigger the skill
